TEXT.source: NTU Corpus, Paiwan, Y2 one-minute spontaneous speech; source EAF: my parents_wuh01 1 min.eaf; anonymized speaker label: wuh01

S.FORM: e aicu a nu kipaqenetj aken ta aicu a niamadju a tulu tjanuaken.
e ti ama avan a na kisan sinsi anga a ripunganan ta zua.
sama na sika tiamadju, nu temulu ta mare aljak uta na ia e liaw aicu a niamadju a e tulu a.
sa paqenetj aken ta azua a tjau temakesikesi aken ta aicu a e gaku, e mavan aicu ku lupian, ia aken a ruvecivecik ta aicu a e sinitulu na e sinsi tu venecik a i tjumaq.
nu maqadav anga nu uri ma gaku anga, e patagilj aken a a magagalj tu kicevung ta aicu a nia sinsi.
e mayatucu e cuay anga ai izua aicu ku varung a a palingi anga a sema gaku.
ama sisa gaku, ia aken a vecivecik.
